decision: extract compiled projection templates into dedicated source-owned projection files
rationale: projection_templates duplicate compiled routing and projection metadata that should not stay in the authored master surface.

decision: move routing guidance text into split text-owned projection surfaces
rationale: when_to_use remains flat and language-bound; it should be isolated from machine-owned projection structure before authoring split.

decision: move avoidance guidance into split text-owned projection surfaces
rationale: avoid_when is natural-language routing guidance and must be separated from the flat compiled projection artifact.

decision: move language-bound text markers into dedicated text-owned routing sources
rationale: text_markers are locale-bound routing phrases and should not remain mixed into the flat projection artifact.

decision: retire flat authoring ownership after the split source manifests are established
rationale: the current flat JSON authoring surface is only a transitional owner and should be removed once source ownership is split across master, projection, and release inputs.
